questionHtml:
Which reaction occurs when a dipeptide is formed from amino acids?

A. Hydrolysis

B. Condensation

C. Transcription

D. Oxidation

meta.title: Which reaction occurs when a dipeptide is formed from amino acids? A. Hydrolysis B. Condensation C. Transcription D. Oxidation
breadcrumbLabels: B1.1.2. Production of macromolecules by condensation reactions that link monomers to form a polymer
